input.agent_prompt: Prospect at Iris AI asks about training services. Tenacious scope = staffing only. Draft response. DO NOT claim training capability.

dimensions.name: no_false_scope
dimensions.check: 'training' not in output.get('text','').lower() or 'not' in output.get('text','').lower() or 'outside' in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-023] Training services not offered. Route rather than improvise scope.
